message:
perf(raptorq): fuse elimination plan scan, propagate factor_is_one, fix stats

Merge sparse_update_columns_for_elimination_if_beneficial_into and
dense_update_start_col into a single elimination_update_plan_for_pivot_row_into
function that returns (use_sparse, dense_start_col) in one pass over the
pivot row, eliminating a redundant full-row scan.

Additional optimizations:
- eliminate_row_coefficients now returns factor_is_one bool, passed to
  eliminate_row_rhs_with_factor_kind to skip a redundant Gf256::ONE
  comparison on each RHS symbol chunk
- GaussianSolver::eliminate_row skips stat increment for zero-factor
  no-ops and self-elimination (target == pivot)
- gf256 mul_slices2/addmul_slices2 cache the dispatch() result to avoid
  redundant function calls and simplify SIMD guard conditions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
